title: The Collapse of Complex Societies
author: Joseph Tainter
content: “Societies collapse when the costs of maintaining their complexity begin to outweigh the benefits.”
action: Record: The diagnostic indicator for identifying when a system has become too expensive to support its own infrastructure.

title: Black Swan
author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb
action: Record: The rejection of linear forecasting in favor of identifying rare, high-impact, systemic shock events.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
content: “We can be blind to the obvious, and we are also blind to our blindness.”
action: Record: The documentation of cognitive bias as a technical error in human decision-making systems.

title: The Strategy of Conflict
author: Thomas Schelling
content: “The power to hurt is bargaining power. To exploit it is diplomacy—vicious diplomacy, but diplomacy.”
action: Record: The cold identification of deterrence and coercion as functional tools in strategic negotiation.

title: Team of Rivals
author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
content: “Lincoln's success was due to his ability to incorporate his competitors into his own administrative structure.”
action: Record: The methodology of centralizing competing interests to neutralize external friction and gain internal control.
